configurations.name: seggfaye
runtimeArgs: const h=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const d='/Users/laminefaye/Projets/mes sites web';h.createServer((q,r)=>{let url=q.url==='/'?'index.html':decodeURIComponent(q.url).replace(/^\//,'');let f=path.join(d,url);fs.readFile(f,(e,data)=>{if(e){r.writeHead(404);r.end('Not found')}else{const ext=path.extname(f).toLowerCase();const m={'.html':'text/html','.png':'image/png','.jpg':'image/jpeg','.jpeg':'image/jpeg','.JPG':'image/jpeg','.PNG':'image/png','.heic':'image/heic','.css':'text/css','.js':'application/javascript','.webp':'image/webp'};r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':m[ext]||'text/plain','Cache-Control':'no-cache'});r.end(data)}})}).listen(3456)
